pageContext.name: Zenitsu Agatsuma Thunderclap and Flash
pageContext.description: From the smash hit 'Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba,' Zenitsu Agatsuma joins FiguartsZERO releasing his Thunderclap and Flash attack! Standing at 5.9 inches, the anime figure uses translucent effect parts to highlight the drama of his flashy finishing move.  Add to your Demon Slayer figure collection today!
